title: ATS Flow Graph
description: Schema for flow_graph.json — the knowledge graph used by ATS Protocol to map business logic flows to code.

project.description: Project name. Should match the Flutter package name.

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last update. AI updates this when modifying the graph.

flows.description: Map of flow names to their definitions. Flow names should be SCREAMING_SNAKE_CASE.

description.description: Human-readable description of what this flow represents. Written by AI after understanding the feature.

active.description: Whether ATS.trace() logs are enabled for this flow. AI sets this to true when debugging, false when done.

classes.description: Maps class names to the list of method names in that class that belong to this flow. A class can appear in multiple flows (at different methods).

additionalProperties.description: List of method names that belong to this flow.

known_issues.description: AI-maintained list of known bugs or gotchas in this flow.

last_debugged.description: ISO 8601 date of the last debug session for this flow. AI updates this.
